top_signals.title: German Bond Yields Hit 15-Year High as Oil Spikes Before ECB - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: German Bond Yields Hit 15-Year High as Oil Spikes Before ECB  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Microsoft Patches a Record 570 Security Flaws
top_signals.summary: Microsoft Corp. today released software updates to plug at least 570 security holes in its Windows operating systems and other software, almost triple the number of vulnerabilities the software giant fixed in its record-smashing Patch Tuesday release last month. Microsoft attributed the burgeoning patch counts to vulnerability discoveries aided by artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion
top_signals.summary: Oracle will supply on-premises software to the U.S. Department of Defense.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PRA consults on updated guidance for friendly society amalgamations and transfers
top_signals.summary: The proposals would provide more detail on the PRA’s approach to Part VIII transactions, helping firms plan amalgamations and transfers more efficiently.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump to slap 'sweeping' new tariffs on 60 trade partners as global duties expire
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration has ramped its tariff actions back up since the president's trade  agenda suffered major legal setbacks earlier this year.

top_signals.title: 'Project Firepower': Inside Rheinmetall's gunpowder expansion as Europe races to replenish its ammunition
top_signals.summary: Scarcity of gunpowder is seen as a choke point for ramping up production of ammunition for militaries, and a barrier for Europe to ensure defense sovereignty

top_signals.title: Commission welcomes the Council's adoption of a renewed Interim Regulation to detect child sexual abuse online
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 23 Jul 2026 The Commission welcomes today's adoption by the Council of a proposal to reinstate the interim derogation from certain provisions of the e-Privacy Directive for the purpose of combating online child sexual abuse. Today's Council adoption includes the amendments that the European Parliament adopted in its vote on 9 July. The Commission has already given a positive opinion to the Parliament's amendments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
